app.name: Network Observability Console
app.description: NOC network observability — device health, topology, traffic

scopes.name: storage:logs:read
scopes.comment: required for VPC flow log queries

scopes.name: storage:entities:read
scopes.comment: required for DQL fetch dt.entity.* Grail queries

scopes.name: storage:metrics:read
scopes.comment: required for DQL timeseries metric queries

scopes.name: environment-api:metrics:read
scopes.comment: required for network device metric queries
